recommendations.title: Full of It
recommendations.overview: A teenager tells outrageous lies at his new high school, only to have them suddenly come true.

recommendations.title: The Savages
recommendations.overview: A sister and brother face the realities of familial responsibility as they begin to care for their ailing father.

recommendations.title: Free Rein: The Twelve Neighs of Christmas
recommendations.overview: As Bright Fields preps for its Mistletoe Ball, a broken ornament leads Zoe to a family secret, while Gaby finds herself at the mercy of new boss Mia.

recommendations.title: The Boys Are Back
recommendations.overview: When the wife of sports-writer Joe Warr dies of cancer, he takes on the responsibility of raising their 6-year-old son, and his teenage son from a previous marriage. As Joe rejects the counsel of his mother-in-law and other parents, he develops his o

recommendations.title: Scars
recommendations.overview: The story of a dysfunctional couple, whose problems will inevitably deteriorate their marriage and their son's life.

recommendations.title: Dolls
recommendations.overview: Dolls takes puppeteering as its overriding motif, which relates thematically to the action provided by the live characters. Chief among those tales is the story of Matsumoto and Sawako, a young couple whose relationship is about to be broken apart by

recommendations.title: Puff: Wonders of the Reef
recommendations.overview: A baby pufferfish travels through a wondrous microworld full of fantastical creatures as he searches for a home on the Great Barrier Reef.

recommendations.title: Abandoned
recommendations.overview: In 1989 the trimaran Rose Noelle set sail from Picton, New Zealand, bound for Tonga with four crew. After a freak wave capsized the yacht, they drifted for 119 days before landing on Great Barrier Island.

recommendations.title: Paulie
recommendations.overview: Paulie, a talking parrot, recounts his travels looking for his original owner to a Russian janitor who helps him to the end of his journey.

recommendations.title: Dutch
recommendations.overview: To get to know his girlfriend's son, a man volunteers to pick him up from a prep school... only to learn that her son's not the nicest kid.
